K0110C Swallowing Tube Code - The data in this column indicates whether parenteral or tube feeding was used wholly or partially during the admission time period. CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether parenteral or tube feeding was used wholly or partially during the admission time period. 0 = No
1 = Yes
